name: Intake Chart App
description: Adds an 'Intake' tab on the note body so medical assistants can capture all eight standard intake sections (Vitals, Problems, Allergies, Medications, PMH, Surgical & Procedure History, Family History, Social History) in one guided form and commit them as native Canvas commands.

protocols.description: NoteApplication that renders the Intake tab on the note body. Declared as a protocol (not an application) so the icon does not also appear in the chart's 9-dot app drawer alongside global launchers — the SDK's APPLICATION__ON_GET event still wires the note tab strip via the NoteApplication's visible()/handle().
Form-state load/save and commit handler for the Intake tab
